title: Rockin' Rockets
description: Custom firework textures that distinguish flight duration and ingredients
body:
# What's in this pack?
This is a simple resource pack that shows visually the effect firework rockets will have when set off.

It distinguishes between Flight Duration, showing a Red rocket for Fd 1, a Magenta rocket for Fd2 and a Blue Rocket for Fd 3, as well as an animated Rainbow rocket for anything above 3 _(only obtainable through commands)_


<details>
<summary>Flight Durations</summary>

![Flight Durations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19cf27125d7d889d1ce5f2c9484e6ad4135b2596.png)


</details>


Rockets can have 5 explotion tipes "Small_ball" (default), "Large_Ball" (fire charge), "Star" (gold nugget), "Creeper" (any skull) and "Burst" (feather), each represented by an animated rainbow texture as shown that replaces the "head" of the rocket:


<details>
<summary>Explosion Types</summary>

![Explosions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a33bdc9000eadccf2160c486da21298e9974c322.png)

</details>

Rockets can also have 2 modifiers on top of the type of explosion: "Trail" (Diamond) and "Twinkle" (Glowstone)
"Trail" changes the "tail" of the rocket into diamond and "Twinkle" adds a sparkle effect (animated)

<details>
<summary>Modifiers</summary>

![Modifiers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5478fe734251c00a8671a851a759233315822f09.png)

</details>

THESE ONLY WORK WHEN MAKING A ROCKET WITH A SINGLE FIREWORK STAR, ANY ROCKET MADE WITH MORE THAN 1 WILL HAVE A SIMPLE RAINBOW ROCKET TEXTURE
